title: El regreso del monstruo
writer: Luis Manrique, Antonio Orellana, Fernando Osés
actors: Luis Aguilar, Tere Velázquez, Jaime Fernández
plot: This is a secuel to "The Phantom Stagecoach" of the Zorro Escarlata (Scarlet Fox) movie serials, this time Sacrlet Fox battles a huge monster created by evil science and black magic,and in the pure style of Gene Autry's The Phanto...
